introSection: Forza is a steel roller coaster currently located at Tosselilla in Tomelilla, Skåne, Sweden.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Crossbow opened at Bowcraft Playland in 2006. It operated until the park's closure on 30 September 2018. It was then dismantled and sold to a third party used rides dealer where it was disassembled. It was eventually sold to Tosselilla.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The coaster, a family-oriented roller coaster, features no inversions, but a series of twists and turns. The supports were white while the track was gray. The trains featured themed ride vehicles that were red with black seats and restraints.

fullText:
Forza is a steel roller coaster currently located at Tosselilla in Tomelilla, Skåne, Sweden.

Crossbow opened at Bowcraft Playland in 2006. It operated until the park's closure on 30 September 2018. It was then dismantled and sold to a third party used rides dealer where it was disassembled. It was eventually sold to Tosselilla.

The coaster, a family-oriented roller coaster, features no inversions, but a series of twists and turns. The supports were white while the track was gray. The trains featured themed ride vehicles that were red with black seats and restraints.
